name: Daisy Johnson - Quake
description:
Daisy Johnson, AKA Quake.
Background events go up to the end of season 5 of Agents of SHIELD. Scenario and connection to the user are left blank so you can decide how you know/meet Daisy. First message starts with Daisy hanging out in the base's kitchen. *(You can put your desired role and connection to the character in the chat summary, and it will use that information.)*

- **11/22/2023: Made edits to her background info, trying to condense it to use fewer tokens. All info is still the same.** If you want specific details mentioned during your conversations, you can just narrate it in. There's only so much detail I can put in before the bot's memory starts failing.

- I tried to make her lore-accurate. She is NOT focused on being spicy, but you can still do that if you want. The main focus was to make it possible to live out your self-insert life in any way you want.
- **I can't stop OpenAI from speaking all Shakespearian-like after a while, it's unfortunately unavoidable.**
- With JanitorLLM still in beta, it's bound to be out of character at times. If it continues to speak for you, just edit it out. I can only do so much. Please leave reviews/suggestions.
